steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts “harmless applications” against “a stimulus that seems less benign” (electric shock). The blank describes the harmless stimuli and must reinforce their apparent safety to establish the paradoxical finding.

steps.title: Match the contrast
steps.content:
Innocuous means harmless and inoffensive—exactly what the vibration and warming treatments are.

Using this word captures the study's paradoxical finding: these benign stimuli offer less relief than something harsher.

The other options don't fit: deceptive suggests misleading (untrue), novel stresses newness (irrelevant), and impractical questions practicality (not the point).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
